trading_day_note: Raw data only, all timestamps ET. No conviction, buckets, or opinions are computed here, that judgment happens later in the AI prompts that read this file.

criteria.day_trading: Trend Join Long. Gap up over 3%, price over $3, market cap over $1B, premarket RVOL over 1.5, price breaking above yesterday's high. Backtest is 54.6% win rate, 1.59 profit factor, 280 trades.
criteria.swing: Gap up 8% or more, price over $3, open above yesterday's high, open above the 200 day SMA, market cap over $800M, and a real catalyst (earnings or news). Backtest is 57.6% win rate / 5.34 profit factor on news catalysts, 44.7% / 2.57 on earnings catalysts. Entry and exit management is still being built, these are starter ideas only, no stops or targets attached.

catalyst_headlines.title: Eli Lilly to buy psychedelics maker AtaiBeckley for $2.8 billion as experimental treatments gain traction
catalyst_headlines.summary: The deal for AtaiBeckley gives Lilly access to experimental drugs based on DMT and MDMA.

catalyst_headlines.title: AtaiBeckley Stock Is Soaring 31% as Eli Lilly Agrees to Buy Psychedelic Drugmaker
catalyst_headlines.summary: Psychedelic drugmaker AtaiBeckley was surging 31% early Thursday after pharma giant Eli Lilly agreed a deal to buy the company. AtaiBeckley shares were up 31.4% to $7.04 in early trading after the deal was confirmed. Lilly will acquire AtaiBeckley for $6.75 per share in cash, plus up to $2.50 per share upon reaching certain developmental and regulatory milestones, the companies said in a press release.

catalyst_headlines.title: Eli Lilly to buy psychedelic drugmaker AtaiBeckley for up to $3.8 billion in bet on depression therapy
catalyst_headlines.summary: Eli Lilly announced it is buying AtaiBeckley in a bet on neuroscience and psychiatric pharmaceuticals.

catalyst_headlines.title: 🔎 Under the Radar: Psychedelic-Drug Stock Soars on Eli Lilly Deal
catalyst_headlines.summary: Eli Lilly has struck a deal to buy psychedelic drug developer AtaiBeckley for an initial $2.8 billion, weeks after the Trump administration pledged to speed up regulatory approvals of mind-altering treatments for mental health. Shares of AtaiBeckley surged 34% to $7.19, above the $6.75 cash purchase price offered by Lilly. The deal includes contingent value rights that bring the total potential deal value to $3.8 billion, or $9.25 a share, if AtaiBeckley drugs hit certain development and regulatory milestones.

catalyst_headlines.title: Eli Lilly to Buy Psychedelic Firm AtaiBeckley for Initial $2.8 Billion
catalyst_headlines.summary: Eli Lilly has struck a deal to buy mental-health-focused AtaiBeckley for an initial $2.8 billion, continuing the drugmaker’s recent buying spree.

gaps_to_fill: Earnings info is only the next earnings date per gapper, not a full market wide earnings calendar.
Intraday levels (VWAP, HOD, LOD, premarket high) come from Yahoo's 5-min bars, which can lag or gap during fast premarket moves.
Premarket RVOL is a stand-in using full-day relative volume, since yfinance reports close to 0 premarket volume through this keyless path. A true premarket RVOL needs a premarket feed like Alpaca.
